overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit urban plaza in Night City. The character ascends a large staircase, explores a bustling pedestrian area with holographic advertisements, stops at a street food vendor to drink, and enters a dark transit station. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with vibrant pink, blue, and green neon lighting against a dusky sky.

reaches top of stairs, transitioning from street level to upper plaza

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and ascending a large staircase toward an elevated plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket with yellow cap walking up the stairs ahead of the camera

massive concrete highway structure overhead with support columns

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at street level in a cyberpunk urban environment, moving toward and ascending a wide staircase with distinctive teal railings. The camera passes an orange structural column and glass building on the left while approaching the elevated highway overpass overhead. The scene transitions from the street sidewalk to the upper plaza level as the stairs are climbed.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, navigating between pedestrians and observing the neon signage

notable_agents.action: muscular shirtless pedestrian walking toward the camera through the plaza

entered.detail: tall palm trees planted along the right side of the plaza
building facade illuminated with bright pink neon lighting
street food vendor stall with vibrant pink neon lighting and paper lanterns
traditional-style paper lanterns hanging at the food stand

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the elevated plaza, passing the prominent Cirrus Cola sign now on the left. The open concrete plaza is populated with scattered pedestrians, including a muscular shirtless man walking toward the camera. To the right, a food stand with pink neon lighting and paper lanterns becomes visible, while palm trees and neon-lit buildings frame the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit street food vendor with counter service

events.description: character stops at the food counter and drinks from a green soda can in first-person view

agents.ego_description: approaching the food stand, stopping to drink from a can, then turning and walking away

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind the counter serving customers

entered.detail: long counter with stools and pink neon underlighting

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the vibrant pink food stand with traditional paper lanterns, stops at the service counter to drink from a green soda can, then turns and walks away. The stand features bright neon lighting and a vendor behind the counter, while other pedestrians walk past in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional plaza area leading to transit entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward a dark covered entrance in the distance

entered.detail: concrete benches with people sitting along the right side
large building with red and teal industrial facade

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the food stand through the open plaza, passing benches on the right where people are seated. The elevated highway structure shifts to the left as the camera approaches a large red industrial building and a dark transit tunnel entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART transit station entrance with neon signage

approaching the NCART entrance with green neon lighting and holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark transit station entrance, approaching the NCART turnstiles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the vending machines on the right wall

entered.detail: dark red marble or polished stone walls lining the entrance corridor
illuminated vending machines along the right wall
green neon sign reading 'NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit Entrance'
bright green neon strips framing the transit entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, enclosed transit station with red marble walls and illuminated vending machines. The lighting shifts dramatically to artificial green neon as the camera approaches the NCART entrance, marked by bright green signage and holographic advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling street-level plaza up into a dark, neon-lit transit station. It begins by ascending a wide staircase with teal railings, passing an orange structural column and a glass building as the camera moves from the sidewalk toward an elevated highway overpass. As the camera reaches the upper plaza, the environment opens into a concrete pedestrian area featuring a prominent Cirrus Cola sign and scattered citizens before drawing closer to a vibrant pink food stand adorned with paper lanterns. After a brief stop at the counter to drink from a green soda can, the camera moves away from the vendor and past seated pedestrians, with the highway structure shifting to the left as a large red industrial building comes into view. The scene finally transitions from the open air into a dark, enclosed transit station, where the lighting shifts dramatically to artificial green neon surrounding red marble walls and holographic NCART signage.
